sessions.summary: User reviewed their monthly finances after salary credit and made a plan to cut food delivery spending in half and transfer ₹30,000 to their house fund on the 25th of the month.
commitments: Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on the 25th of the month
Cut food delivery spending in half (target ~₹5,845 this month)
insights: User has a house fund savings goal of ₹15 lakh within 2 years
Food delivery (Swiggy + Zomato) was the single biggest discretionary expense last month at ₹11,690 across 8 orders
User's monthly committed bills total ₹46,500 (rent, SIP, internet/mobile, credit card)
